enroll.title: Help add context to posts
enroll.body1: Community Notes are short notes attached to posts that need more context. Contributors author them and rate each other's drafts; only notes the community marks helpful are shown to readers.
enroll.body2: Enrolling opts you into the contributor portal: pending posts, the rating queue, and your authored-notes profile.

pendingTab.empty: No posts have been flagged yet. Check back later.

rateTab.empty: Nothing to rate right now. Drafts other contributors submit will appear here.

profile.noNotes: You haven't written any notes yet.
profile.showPubliclyTitle: Show my notes under my handle
profile.showPubliclyHint: When off, notes you author are attributed to "anonymous contributor".

note.headlineUnderReview: Note under review, needs more ratings
note.rateModalSubtitle: Your rating helps decide whether the note is shown to other readers.
note.commentPlaceholder: Optional notes for the rating team
note.sourcesSubtitle: Citations attached to this note by the contributor.

notHelpfulReasons.sourcesDoNotSupport: Sources do not support the note

contributor.addSubtitle: Your note is private until enough raters mark it helpful. Stick to verifiable facts and cite sources.
contributor.problemQuestion: What's the problem with this post?
contributor.notePlaceholder: Explain what's missing or misleading. Cite sources below.
contributor.requestSubtitle: Flag this post for a contributor to review. We'll alert the rater pool, you won't see the note immediately.
contributor.commentPlaceholder: Add useful context for the contributor
